services.title: OpenRouter query
services.summary: Diff credits and API keys vs config; optional --import from live API (JSON on stdout).

services.title: OpenRouter maintain
services.summary: Create or update managed inference API keys; optional --prune for hdc-tracked removals.

next_steps: Run `hdc run infrastructure openrouter query --` to verify credits and API key drift.
After maintain creates a key, ensure consumer services (e.g. hermes) have the inference vault key set.
Management key (`HDC_OPENROUTER_MANAGEMENT_API_KEY`) cannot be used for chat completions — use per-consumer inference keys.
